name: WiFi & ADB Keep-Alive
author: Ava
description: Keep WiFi radio and ADB debugging alive across crashes and reboots. Root preferred, Shizuku fallback. Never disables WiFi or ADB.

config.label: WiFi Keep-Alive
config.description: Keep the WiFi radio on when it is turned off; Android reconnects to saved networks automatically

config.label: ADB Keep-Alive
config.description: Keep USB/wireless ADB debugging on and preserve host authorization
